---
name: Contributor access request
about: Request collaborator (write) access to the AuraCRM Docs repository
title: 'Contributor access request: <your GitHub username>'
labels: ['access-request']
assignees: ['aoneahsan']
---

<!--
You do NOT need write access to contribute — forking and opening a pull request works for anyone.
Request access only if you expect to contribute regularly. Note that even with write access, all
changes to `main` still go through a reviewed pull request; write access does not allow direct
pushes to `main`.
-->

## Your GitHub username

<!-- e.g. @your-username -->

## What do you plan to contribute?

<!-- A short description of the docs work you intend to help with. -->

## Have you contributed here before?

- [ ] Yes — I have opened one or more pull requests to this repository.
- [ ] No — this would be my first contribution.

## Acknowledgement

- [ ] I understand that all changes to `main` require a reviewed pull request and a passing CI build,
      and that write access does not permit direct pushes to `main`.
